message:
test(comparison): expand edit distance test coverage

Adds comprehensive tests for all edit distance module exports:

levenshteinDistance:
- Empty string handling
- Single character differences
- Optimization verification (shorter string swap produces same result)

approximateLevenshtein:
- Long sequence windowed approximation
- Different sequences with calculated distance
- Length difference handling
- Window count and size validation

levenshteinWithOperations:
- Complete operation trace validation
- Operation types (insert, delete, substitute, keep)

normalizedLevenshtein / levenshteinSimilarity:
- Normalization to [0,1] range
- Similarity complement relationship

hammingDistance:
- Equal length requirement
- Position-based mismatch counting

percentIdentity:
- Identity calculation as percentage
- Edge cases (empty, identical, different)

longestCommonSubsequence / lcsSimilarity:
- LCS extraction
- Similarity derivation from LCS

analyzeEditDistance:
- Full analysis object structure
- All metrics consistency

quickSimilarityEstimate:
- Fast estimation for long sequences
- Boundary conditions

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
